# Research Pull Request

## Track

- [ ] Nova 1: Factorial structure
- [ ] Nova 2: Additive occupancy
- [ ] Nova 3: Analytic density
- [ ] Nova 4: Computation and verification
- [ ] Integration

## Result class

- [ ] PROVED
- [ ] CONDITIONAL
- [ ] FINITE_CERTIFICATE
- [ ] COMPUTATIONAL_EVIDENCE
- [ ] HEURISTIC
- [ ] DISPROVED
- [ ] OPEN or organizational only

## Summary

State exactly what this pull request adds or changes.

## Mathematical claims

List theorem, conjecture, obstruction, dataset, or verifier IDs.

## Dependencies

List every theorem and external result used, with status.

## Validation

```text
Commands run:
Environment:
Expected and observed result:
```

## Required checks

- [ ] Definitions match `docs/COMMON_NOTATION.md`.
- [ ] Exact hypotheses and quantifiers are stated.
- [ ] Divisor legality is proved or verified.
- [ ] Numerical distinctness is proved or verified.
- [ ] Term counts include corrections and exceptions.
- [ ] Boundary ranges are covered.
- [ ] Finite evidence is not described as asymptotic proof.
- [ ] Conditional results name every open dependency.
- [ ] Failed routes are preserved rather than deleted.
- [ ] Relevant theorem and handoff registries are updated.

## What is not claimed

State nearby conclusions that this pull request does not prove.

## Requested reviewers

Name the track or independent Nova needed for reconstruction.

## Integration effect

State which integration gate or proof-chain node changes, if any.
